title: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE: LINKING FARMERS, ADVISORS AND RESEARCHERS TO BOOST INNOVATION
subtitle: Encouraging and motivating small farmers to participate in group discussions
description: A practice abstract detailing how a Living Lab in Giurgiu County, Romania, facilitated cooperative development among small farmers by building trust and offering direct advisory support. It highlights the importance of clear information, association, and co-creation to address fiscal, financial, and organizational challenges within the cooperative.
